name: Tubal-cain
oracleText:
When Tubal-cain enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token.
Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, Tubal-cain deals 1 damage to each opponent.
Artifacts you control have "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."
flavorText: "An instructer of every artificer in brass and iron." — Genesis 4:22
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the reusable Wikimedia Commons Medhurst illustration "Tubal-cain's bronze and iron" after De Vos.
title: Forger of Bronze and Iron
